languages.text: "Исключено. В силу конструктивных особенностей благословленного гальванического элемента, вмещаемого моей брюшной полостью, прямой контакт с наполненными водой резервуарами приведет к неконтролируемому разливу Движущей Силы. Последнее, чего мне хотелось бы — стать причиной гибели Вольного Торговца. К тому же таинство дезинфекции, регулярно свершаемое мной при выходе из лаборатории, лишает меня потребности в дополнительных гигиенических процедурах".

"Certainly not. Due to the design features of the blessed galvanic cell housed within my abdomen, direct contact with the water-filled tanks will result in an uncontrolled discharge of the Motive Force. Causing the death of the Rogue Trader is the very last thing I would wish. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."
languages.original_text: "Исключено. В силу конструктивных особенностей благословленного гальванического элемента, вмещаемого моей брюшной полостью, прямой контакт с наполненными водой резервуарами приведет к неконтролируемому разливу Движущей Силы. Последнее, чего мне хотелось бы — стать причиной гибели Вольного Торговца. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."

"Certainly not. Due to the design features of the blessed galvanic cell housed within my abdomen, direct contact with the water-filled tanks will result in an uncontrolled discharge of the Motive Force. Causing the death of the Rogue Trader is the very last thing I would wish. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."

languages.text: «Le aseguro que no. Habida cuenta de las características de diseño de la bendita célula galvánica que se aloja en mi abdomen, el contacto directo con un depósito lleno de agua provocaría una descarga descontrolada de la Fuerza Motriz; y lo último que deseo es causar la muerte {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente. Además, el sacramento de la desinfección que llevo a cabo con regularidad siempre que salgo de mi laboratorio me permite prescindir de todo procedimiento higiénico ulterior».
languages.original_text: "Certainly not. Due to the design features of the blessed galvanic cell housed within my abdomen, direct contact with the water-filled tanks will result in an uncontrolled discharge of the Motive Force. Causing the death of the Rogue Trader is the very last thing I would wish. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."

Habida cuenta de las características de diseño de la bendita célula galvánica que se aloja en mi abdomen, el contacto directo con un depósito lleno de agua provocaría una descarga descontrolada de la Fuerza Motriz; y lo último que deseo es causar la muerte {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente. Además, el sacramento de la desinfección que llevo a cabo con regularidad siempre que salgo de mi laboratorio me permite prescindir de todo procedimiento higiénico ulterior».

languages.text: “当然不会。由于我腹中所容纳的神圣原电池设计特殊，一旦直接接触这盛满水的浴缸，就会不受控制地释放源力。我最不希望发生的事，就是致使行商浪人死亡。更何况，我离开实验室时会定期执行消毒圣礼，因此没有必要再进行额外的卫生程序。”
languages.original_text: "Certainly not. Due to the design features of the blessed galvanic cell housed within my abdomen, direct contact with the water-filled tanks will result in an uncontrolled discharge of the Motive Force. Causing the death of the Rogue Trader is the very last thing I would wish. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: “当然不会。由于我腹中所容纳的神圣原电池设计特殊，一旦直接接触这盛满水的浴缸，就会不受控制地释放源力。我最不希望发生的事，就是致使行商浪人死亡。更何况，我离开实验室时会定期执行消毒圣礼，因此没有必要再进行额外的卫生程序。”

languages.text: « Certainement pas. La conception de la cellule galvanique sacrée qui se trouve dans mon abdomen fait que tout contact direct avec un réservoir rempli d'eau provoquerait une décharge incontrôlée de Force Motrice. Je ne voudrais pas provoquer la mort {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. De plus, le sacrement de désinfection que j'effectue régulièrement en quittant mon laboratoire rend inutiles les autres procédures d'hygiène. »
languages.original_text: "Certainly not. Due to the design features of the blessed galvanic cell housed within my abdomen, direct contact with the water-filled tanks will result in an uncontrolled discharge of the Motive Force. Causing the death of the Rogue Trader is the very last thing I would wish. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: « Certainement pas. La conception de la cellule galvanique sacrée qui se trouve dans mon abdomen fait que tout contact direct avec un réservoir rempli d'eau provoquerait une décharge incontrôlée de Force Motrice. Je ne voudrais pas provoquer la mort {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. De plus, le sacrement de désinfection que j'effectue régulièrement en quittant mon laboratoire rend inutiles les autres procédures d'hygiène. »

languages.text: "Kesinlikle hayır. Karnımda bulunan kutsanmış galvaniz hücrenin tasarım özellikleri nedeniyle, su dolu tanklarla doğrudan temas... Devinim Gücü'nün kontrolsüz bir şekilde salınımına neden olacaktır. Hür Tacir'in ölümüne neden olmak, isteyeceğim en son şeydir. Dahası... Laboratuvarımdan çıkarken düzenli olarak gerçekleştirdiğim dezenfeksiyon ayini, her türlü ek hijyen prosedürünü gereksiz kılıyor."
languages.original_text: "Certainly not. Due to the design features of the blessed galvanic cell housed within my abdomen, direct contact with the water-filled tanks will result in an uncontrolled discharge of the Motive Force. Causing the death of the Rogue Trader is the very last thing I would wish. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: "Kesinlikle hayır. Karnımda bulunan kutsanmış galvaniz hücrenin tasarım özellikleri nedeniyle, su dolu tanklarla doğrudan temas... Devinim Gücü'nün kontrolsüz bir şekilde salınımına neden olacaktır. Hür Tacir'in ölümüne neden olmak, isteyeceğim en son şeydir. Dahası... Laboratuvarımdan çıkarken düzenli olarak gerçekleştirdiğim dezenfeksiyon ayini, her türlü ek hijyen prosedürünü gereksiz kılıyor."

languages.text: 「とんでもありません。私の腹部に収められた聖なるガルヴァニック・セルの設計上の特性により、水で満たされた槽との直接接触はモーティヴ・フォースの制御不能な放電を引き起こします。ローグトレーダーを死に至らしめることこそ、私が最も望まぬことです。さらに申し上げれば、私が研究室を出る際に定期的に執り行う消毒の聖礼により、いかなる追加的な衛生処置も不要となるのです」
languages.original_text: "Certainly not. Due to the design features of the blessed galvanic cell housed within my abdomen, direct contact with the water-filled tanks will result in an uncontrolled discharge of the Motive Force. Causing the death of the Rogue Trader is the very last thing I would wish. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: 「とんでもありません。私の腹部に収められた聖なるガルヴァニック・セルの設計上の特性により、水で満たされた槽との直接接触はモーティヴ・フォースの制御不能な放電を引き起こします。ローグトレーダーを死に至らしめることこそ、私が最も望まぬことです。さらに申し上げれば、私が研究室を出る際に定期的に執り行う消毒の聖礼により、いかなる追加的な衛生処置も不要となるのです」

languages.text: "Sicher nicht. Aufgrund des Designs der gesegneten galvanischen Zelle in meinem Abdomen führt jeder direkte Kontakt mit wassergefüllten Behältern zu einer unkontrollierten Entladung der Antriebskraft. Den Tod {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} zu verantworten, wäre das Letzte, was ich will. Überdies macht das Sakrament der Desinfektion, das ich vor dem Verlassen meines Labors regelmäßig durchführe, weitere Hygieneprozeduren überflüssig."
languages.original_text: "Certainly not. Due to the design features of the blessed galvanic cell housed within my abdomen, direct contact with the water-filled tanks will result in an uncontrolled discharge of the Motive Force. Causing the death of the Rogue Trader is the very last thing I would wish. What is more, the sacrament of disinfection, which I perform regularly upon exiting my lab, renders any additional hygiene procedures unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: "Sicher nicht. Aufgrund des Designs der gesegneten galvanischen Zelle in meinem Abdomen führt jeder direkte Kontakt mit wassergefüllten Behältern zu einer unkontrollierten Entladung der Antriebskraft. Den Tod {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} zu verantworten, wäre das Letzte, was ich will. Überdies macht das Sakrament der Desinfektion, das ich vor dem Verlassen meines Labors regelmäßig durchführe, weitere Hygieneprozeduren überflüssig."
